feedback.text: Honorable European Commission, I'm providing feedback on the Digital Fairness Act in the form of a request to include the following section about the ability for consumers to own their purchased video games, even in the event of the game publisher discontinuing support for said game. I suggest adding the following point towards the Digital Fairness Act: "Publishers permanently disabling video games they have already sold. Some publishers are selling video games under terms that may violate Directive 93/13/EEC and deliberately prevent customers from retaining or repairing their purchase." Thank you in advance for your consideration.
